title: Monster Energy
description: Turn your golden carrot into the monster energy!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7f75523bacba8a7ef2290960d4a6710c3aa111d_0.webp)
## About this pack
This **joke** resource packs replaces the golden carrot with an energy drink - Monster Energy! Also Fletching Table is replaced by Monster Energy box.

Special thanks for [Animun](https://x.com/animuns_body) for localization for many languages and new textures!
